\tzpentry{ID4356}{Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4356 introduces Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$V_{S^3}/(R\cdot A_{S^2}) = \frac{2\pi^2R^3}{4\pi R^3}=\frac{\pi}{2} \approx 1.5708$
\]
